name: Cyberlinks Co., Ltd.
summary: Cyberlinks Co., Ltd. provides IT cloud and mobile network services for the system development, installation, maintenance, and operational support in Japan. The company offers its services for the distribution industry and government agencies, as well as in the areas of medical information system, product information and image database, school education institution, CATV-ISP, hardware maintenance, and specialty store sales management system. It also operates 7 DoCoMo stores that sell smartphones, mobile phones, data cards, etc. to corporate users or general users; and consulting and after-sales services, etc. The company was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Wakayama, Japan.
